CustomField.description: Identify Customer Industry Application. Standardized Names (no double spaces, no space after slash, spaces before and after '&', use '&' vs 'and', space after commas, lists do not have comma before last item and use '&' before last item)
CustomField.label: Application

value.fullName: General Academic Teaching Lab - not for research
value.label: General Academic Teaching Lab - not for research

value.fullName: Lead Optimization in vitro functional & safety testing
value.label: Lead Optimization in vitro functional & safety testing
